name: stationadmin-shuffle
description: StationAdmin shuffle algorithm scripts for laut.fm

scripts.build:
cd src && npx tsc && npx prettier --write StationAdmin.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),f='StationAdmin.js',h=fs.readFileSync('StationAdmin.ts','utf8').split('
').slice(0,2).join('
')+'

';fs.writeFileSync(f,h+fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));"
